title: Figure 9 from: Pourmoghaddam MJ, Lambert C, Voglmayr H, Khodaparast SA, Stadler M (2026) A polyphasic study of Hypoxylaceae (Xylariales, Ascomycota) in Iran: new species and records from Hyrcanian forests. MycoKeys 131: 1-40. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.131.186541
author: Pourmoghaddam, Mohammad Javad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 9 Hypoxylon hyrcanense (holotype GUM 1601). A–C. Stromatal habit; D, E. Close-up view of stromatal surface, with stromatal pigments in 10% KOH; F. Stroma in horizontal section showing perithecia and granules; G. Immature and mature asci in Melzer's reagent; H. Ascus tip in Melzer's reagent; I. Ascospores in water; J. Ascospores in 10% KOH with dehiscent perispore; K, L. Ascospore under SEM. Scale bars: 5 mm (C); 1.25 mm (D); 0.5 mm (E); 0.25 mm (F); 20 µm (G); 10 µm (H–J); 4 µm (K); 3 µm (L).
